CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE REV_INCR

AS
(			SELECT	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.PRODUCT_KEY, REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
				REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
						REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
						REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
						 REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
				REV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, REV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
						REV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, --REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
				REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
						   PR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,          --PR.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION ,       
				PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
						PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, 
						CASE 
							WHEN PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='GOODS'                   THEN PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID                   
							ELSE PR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID  
						END AS RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
				REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
						REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				          REV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
						REV.GL_DT, REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
				REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG, REV.GL_POSTED_DTM,
						REV.DV_FMV_FLG, REV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,
				REV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
						REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
						REV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,REV.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
				REV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
						REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,REV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
				REV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
						REV.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY  ,
				Current_Timestamp(0) AS SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM                                                      
				,REV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
				FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE  REV  
				INNER JOIN   (
						SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
						FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   
						WHERE	FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =3 GROUP BY 1   ) FIS 
					ON FIS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
					AND REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
					AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
				'ATTRIBUTED')  
					AND REV.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
					AND REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0  
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR2 PR 
					ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=REV.PRODUCT_KEY)  
				WHERE	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN   (  
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_AS_SOL_AOT_ALLOCATION 
						WHERE	AOT_TAGGING_DATETIME >  '$$LastExtractDate'    
						UNION   
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
						FROM	$$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM IN (  
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	 $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD  INCR 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1 
								UNION 
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1)  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R','R')    
						GROUP BY 1  
						UNION 
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
					'R')    
						GROUP BY 1 )  
					OR (REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) IN  ( 
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>'$$LastExtractDate' 
							AND DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
						GROUP BY 1,2       
						UNION  ALL
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE MT 
						INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR R        
							ON MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = R.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
							AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE IN (0,1)  
						WHERE	DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
							AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 
						GROUP BY 1,2 )   ) WITH DATA PRIMARY INDEX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SALES_REP_NUMBER ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
						
						
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_REP_NUMBER) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) ON REV_INCR	;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON REV_INCR;

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL
SELECT	 REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
			Coalesce(NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
				-9999)  BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
			REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY, REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
			REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * Coalesce(DYN.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
				REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, REV_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, DYN.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
				DYN.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,  REV_INCR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
			            REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
				REV_INCR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
			REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
			REV_INCR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			          REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_DT,
			REV_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD, REV_INCR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
			REV_INCR.DV_FMV_FLG, REV_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
				REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
			REV_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
			REV_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
				REV_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,REV_INCR.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
			REV_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
			REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM ,
			DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  
		FROM	REV_INCR  
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR1 RSH 
			ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
			AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX ART 
			ON(REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY=ART.AR_TRX_KEY)  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE SATL   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  SATIL                   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT    
			ON  NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXO 
			ON (NXO.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA 
			ON (NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL  
			ON (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NAR   
			ON (NAR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMR   
			ON (NMR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL_RS    
			ON (NROL_RS.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY DYN  
			ON DYN.ITEM_KEY=REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY  
			AND DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  IN  ( 'ADVANCED SERVICES'  )       
		WHERE	  ( ( REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0  
			AND REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY < 0 
			AND ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY < 0  
			AND  REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0 
			AND REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY<0  
			AND REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY<0      
			AND ((SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE ='LINE   '  
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
				OR (SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE<>'LINE' and REV_INCR.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD in('Deferral-Release','Provision Adjustment'  )
and REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT >=202504    ))                
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' 
			AND  REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'SERVICE'  )                  
			OR ( REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T') )                  
			OR (REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 
			AND  REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
			OR (REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')  ) 
			OR (REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 
			AND REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320'))       
			OR (REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )  
			OR (REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )   
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY > 0 
			AND DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )     )  
			AND (REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <= -1000000 
			OR (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  
			AND SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)) 
			AND REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y';

CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE REV_INCR

AS
(			SELECT	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.PRODUCT_KEY, REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
				REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
						REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
						REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
						 REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
				REV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, REV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
						REV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, --REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
				REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
						   PR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,          --PR.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION ,       
				PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
						PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, 
						CASE 
							WHEN PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='GOODS'                   THEN PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID                   
							ELSE PR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID  
						END AS RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
				REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
						REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				          REV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
						REV.GL_DT, REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
				REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG, REV.GL_POSTED_DTM,
						REV.DV_FMV_FLG, REV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,
				REV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
						REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
						REV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,REV.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
				REV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
						REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,REV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
				REV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
						REV.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY  ,
				Current_Timestamp(0) AS SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM                                                     
				,REV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD	
				FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE  REV  
				INNER JOIN   (
						SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
						FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   
						WHERE	FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =4 GROUP BY 1   ) FIS 
					ON FIS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
					AND REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
					AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
				'ATTRIBUTED')  
					AND REV.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
					AND REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0  
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR2 PR 
					ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=REV.PRODUCT_KEY)  
				WHERE	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN   (  
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_AS_SOL_AOT_ALLOCATION 
						WHERE	AOT_TAGGING_DATETIME >  '$$LastExtractDate'    
						UNION   
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
						FROM	$$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM IN (  
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	 $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD  INCR 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1 
								UNION 
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1)  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R','R')    
						GROUP BY 1  
						UNION 
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
					'R')    
						GROUP BY 1 )  
					OR (REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) IN  ( 
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>'$$LastExtractDate' 
							AND DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
						GROUP BY 1,2       
						UNION  ALL
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE MT 
						INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR R        
							ON MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = R.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
							AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE IN (0,1)  
						WHERE	DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
							AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 
						GROUP BY 1,2 )   ) WITH DATA PRIMARY INDEX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SALES_REP_NUMBER ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
						
						
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_REP_NUMBER) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) ON REV_INCR	;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON REV_INCR;

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL
SELECT	 REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
			Coalesce(NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
				-9999)  BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
			REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY, REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
			REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * Coalesce(DYN.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
				REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, REV_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, DYN.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
				DYN.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,  REV_INCR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
			            REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
				REV_INCR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
			REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
			REV_INCR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			          REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_DT,
			REV_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD, REV_INCR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
			REV_INCR.DV_FMV_FLG, REV_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
				REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
			REV_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
			REV_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
				REV_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,REV_INCR.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
			REV_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
			REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM ,
			DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  
		FROM	REV_INCR  
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR1 RSH 
			ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
			AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX ART 
			ON(REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY=ART.AR_TRX_KEY)  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE SATL   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  SATIL                   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT    
			ON  NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXO 
			ON (NXO.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA 
			ON (NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL  
			ON (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NAR   
			ON (NAR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMR   
			ON (NMR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL_RS    
			ON (NROL_RS.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY DYN  
			ON DYN.ITEM_KEY=REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY  
			AND DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  IN  ( 'ADVANCED SERVICES'  )       
		WHERE	  ( ( REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0  
			AND REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY < 0 
			AND ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY < 0  
			AND  REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0 
			AND REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY<0  
			AND REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY<0      
			AND ((SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE ='LINE   '  
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
				OR (SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE<>'LINE' and REV_INCR.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD in('Deferral-Release','Provision Adjustment'  )
and REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT >=202504    ))                
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' 
			AND  REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'SERVICE'  )                  
			OR ( REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T') )                  
			OR (REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 
			AND  REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
			OR (REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')  ) 
			OR (REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 
			AND REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320'))       
			OR (REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )  
			OR (REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )   
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY > 0 
			AND DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )     )  
			AND (REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <= -1000000 
			OR (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  
			AND SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)) 
			AND REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y';

CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE REV_INCR

AS
(			SELECT	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.PRODUCT_KEY, REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
				REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
						REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
						REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
						 REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
				REV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, REV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
						REV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, --REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
				REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
						   PR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,          --PR.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION ,       
				PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
						PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, 
						CASE 
							WHEN PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='GOODS'                   THEN PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID                   
							ELSE PR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID  
						END AS RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
				REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
						REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				          REV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
						REV.GL_DT, REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
				REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG, REV.GL_POSTED_DTM,
						REV.DV_FMV_FLG, REV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,
				REV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
						REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
						REV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,REV.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
				REV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
						REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,REV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
				REV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
						REV.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY  ,
				Current_Timestamp(0) AS SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM ,
REV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD				
				FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE  REV  
				INNER JOIN   (
						SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
						FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   
						WHERE	FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =2 GROUP BY 1   ) FIS 
					ON FIS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
					AND REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
					AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
				'ATTRIBUTED')  
					AND REV.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
					AND REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0  
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR2 PR 
					ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=REV.PRODUCT_KEY)  
				WHERE	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN   (  
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_AS_SOL_AOT_ALLOCATION 
						WHERE	AOT_TAGGING_DATETIME >  '$$LastExtractDate'    
						UNION   
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
						FROM	$$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM IN (  
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	 $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD  INCR 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1 
								UNION 
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1)  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R','R')    
						GROUP BY 1  
						UNION 
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
					'R')    
						GROUP BY 1 )  
					OR (REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) IN  ( 
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>'$$LastExtractDate' 
							AND DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
						GROUP BY 1,2       
						UNION  ALL
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE MT 
						INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR R        
							ON MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = R.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
							AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE IN (0,1)  
						WHERE	DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
							AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 
						GROUP BY 1,2 )   ) WITH DATA PRIMARY INDEX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SALES_REP_NUMBER ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
						
						
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_REP_NUMBER) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) ON REV_INCR	;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON REV_INCR;

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL
SELECT	 REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
			Coalesce(NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
				-9999)  BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
			REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY, REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
			REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * Coalesce(DYN.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
				REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, REV_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, DYN.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
				DYN.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,  REV_INCR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
			            REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
				REV_INCR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
			REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
			REV_INCR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			          REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_DT,
			REV_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD, REV_INCR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
			REV_INCR.DV_FMV_FLG, REV_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
				REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
			REV_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
			REV_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
				REV_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,REV_INCR.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
			REV_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
			REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM ,
			DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  
		FROM	REV_INCR  
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR1 RSH 
			ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
			AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX ART 
			ON(REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY=ART.AR_TRX_KEY)  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE SATL   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  SATIL                   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT    
			ON  NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXO 
			ON (NXO.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA 
			ON (NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL  
			ON (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NAR   
			ON (NAR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMR   
			ON (NMR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL_RS    
			ON (NROL_RS.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY DYN  
			ON DYN.ITEM_KEY=REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY  
			AND DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  IN  ( 'ADVANCED SERVICES'  )       
		WHERE	  ( ( REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0  
			AND REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY < 0 
			AND ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY < 0  
			AND  REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0 
			AND REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY<0  
			AND REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY<0      
			AND ((SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE ='LINE   '  
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
				OR (SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE<>'LINE' and REV_INCR.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD in('Deferral-Release','Provision Adjustment'  )
and REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT >=202504    ))                
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' 
			AND  REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'SERVICE'  )                  
			OR ( REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T') )                  
			OR (REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 
			AND  REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
			OR (REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')  ) 
			OR (REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 
			AND REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320'))       
			OR (REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )  
			OR (REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )   
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY > 0 
			AND DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )     )  
			AND (REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <= -1000000 
			OR (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  
			AND SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)) 
			AND REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y';

DELETE FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL ALL;

CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE REV_INCR

AS
(			SELECT	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.PRODUCT_KEY, REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
				REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
						REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
						REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
						 REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
				REV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, REV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
						REV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, --REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
				REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
						   PR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,          --PR.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION ,       
				PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
						PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, 
						CASE 
							WHEN PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='GOODS'                   THEN PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID                   
							ELSE PR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID  
						END AS RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
				REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
						REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				          REV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
						REV.GL_DT, REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
				REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG, REV.GL_POSTED_DTM,
						REV.DV_FMV_FLG, REV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,
				REV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
						REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
						REV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,REV.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
				REV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
						REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,REV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
				REV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
						REV.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY  ,
				Current_Timestamp(0) AS SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
				,REV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
				FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE  REV  
				INNER JOIN   (
						SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
						FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   
						WHERE	FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =0 GROUP BY 1   ) FIS 
					ON FIS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
					AND REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
					AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
				'ATTRIBUTED')  
					AND REV.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
					AND REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0  
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR2 PR 
					ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=REV.PRODUCT_KEY)  
				WHERE	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN   (  
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_AS_SOL_AOT_ALLOCATION 
						WHERE	AOT_TAGGING_DATETIME >  '$$LastExtractDate'    
						UNION   
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
						FROM	$$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM IN (  
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	 $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD  INCR 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1 
								UNION 
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1)  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R','R')    
						GROUP BY 1  
						UNION 
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
					'R')    
						GROUP BY 1 )  
					OR (REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) IN  ( 
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>'$$LastExtractDate' 
							AND DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
						GROUP BY 1,2       
						UNION  ALL
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE MT 
						INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR R        
							ON MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = R.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
							AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE IN (0,1)  
						WHERE	DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
							AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 
						GROUP BY 1,2 )   ) WITH DATA PRIMARY INDEX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SALES_REP_NUMBER ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
						
						
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_REP_NUMBER) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) ON REV_INCR	;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON REV_INCR;

CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE REV_INCR

AS
(			SELECT	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.PRODUCT_KEY, REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
						REV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
				REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
						REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
						REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
				REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
						 REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
						REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
				REV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, REV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
						REV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, --REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
				REV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
						   PR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,          --PR.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION ,       
				PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
						PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, 
						CASE 
							WHEN PR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='GOODS'                   THEN PR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID                   
							ELSE PR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID  
						END AS RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
				REV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
						REV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				          REV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
						REV.GL_DT, REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
				REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG, REV.GL_POSTED_DTM,
						REV.DV_FMV_FLG, REV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD      ,
				REV.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
						REV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
						REV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,REV.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
				REV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
						REV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,REV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
				REV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  ,
						REV.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY  ,
				Current_Timestamp(0) AS SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM 
				,REV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
				FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE  REV  
				INNER JOIN   (
						SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
						FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   
						WHERE	FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =1 GROUP BY 1   ) FIS 
					ON FIS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  = REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
					AND REV.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
					AND REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
				'ATTRIBUTED')  
					AND REV.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
					AND REV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0  
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR2 PR 
					ON (PR.ITEM_KEY=REV.PRODUCT_KEY)  
				WHERE	 REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN   (  
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_AS_SOL_AOT_ALLOCATION 
						WHERE	AOT_TAGGING_DATETIME >  '$$LastExtractDate'    
						UNION   
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
						FROM	$$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM IN (  
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	 $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD  INCR 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1 
								UNION 
								SELECT	BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM 
								FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
								WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'   
									AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
						'R')   
								GROUP BY 1)  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R','R')    
						GROUP BY 1  
						UNION 
						SELECT	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
						FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'  
							AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('B&R',
					'R')    
						GROUP BY 1 )  
					OR (REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
				REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) IN  ( 
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE 
						WHERE	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>'$$LastExtractDate' 
							AND DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
						GROUP BY 1,2       
						UNION  ALL
						SELECT	DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
					DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
						FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE MT 
						INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR R        
							ON MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = R.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
							AND FISCAL_QTR_AGE IN (0,1)  
						WHERE	DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' 
							AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE',
					'ATTRIBUTED')  
							AND RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG='N'  
							AND DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT <>0 
							AND DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 
						GROUP BY 1,2 )   ) WITH DATA PRIMARY INDEX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,SALES_REP_NUMBER ,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
						
						
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(SALES_REP_NUMBER) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN( REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) ON REV_INCR;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT) ON REV_INCR	;
COLLECT STATS COLUMN(REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) ON REV_INCR;

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL
SELECT	 REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
			Coalesce(NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
				-9999)  BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,
			REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY, REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
			REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, REV_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_DT, REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * Coalesce(DYN.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
				REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, REV_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
				REV_INCR.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, DYN.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
				DYN.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,  REV_INCR.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
			            REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
				REV_INCR.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
			Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
				USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
			REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
				REV_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
			REV_INCR.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
				REV_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
			          REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_DT,
			REV_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD, REV_INCR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
				REV_INCR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
			REV_INCR.DV_FMV_FLG, REV_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
				REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
			REV_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
			REV_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
				REV_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,REV_INCR.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID ,
			REV_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY ,
			REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ,
				REV_INCR.SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM ,
			DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  
		FROM	REV_INCR  
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR1 RSH 
			ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
			AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX ART 
			ON(REV_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY=ART.AR_TRX_KEY)  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE SATL   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  SATIL                   
			ON REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
		LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT    
			ON  NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE   NXO 
			ON (NXO.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRA 
			ON (NRA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL  
			ON (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NAR   
			ON (NAR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY)  
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMR   
			ON (NMR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY = REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL_RS    
			ON (NROL_RS.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY)    
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY DYN  
			ON DYN.ITEM_KEY=REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY  
			AND DYN.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  IN  ( 'ADVANCED SERVICES'  )       
		WHERE	  ( ( REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0  
			AND REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY < 0 
			AND ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY < 0  
			AND  REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY<0 
			AND REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY<0  
			AND REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY<0      
			AND ((SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE ='LINE   '  
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
				OR (SATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE<>'LINE' and REV_INCR.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD in('Deferral-Release','Provision Adjustment'  )
and REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT >=202504    ))                
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' 
			AND  REV_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'SERVICE'  )                  
			OR ( REV_INCR.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T') )                  
			OR (REV_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 
			AND  REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')) 
			OR (REV_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY > 0 
			AND   REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320')  ) 
			OR (REV_INCR.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY > 0 
			AND REV_INCR.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310',
				'43320'))       
			OR (REV_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )  
			OR (REV_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY > 0 
			AND   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )   
			OR (REV_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY > 0 
			AND DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ('41001',
			'43310', '43320') )     )  
			AND (REV_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <= -1000000 
			OR (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  
			AND SATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)) 
			AND REV_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y';

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  TQUOTE.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM, BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,   BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY,      SOL.DV_BKGS_REV_CD, DV_QT_ASSOCIATION_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), USER, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), USER,
SOL.BK_SS_CD
FROM 
$$SERVICEVWDB.N_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_TASK_ATB TQUOTE
INNER JOIN 
$$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD SOL 
ON TQUOTE.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM = SOL.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM
AND TQUOTE.BK_SS_CD = SOL.BK_SS_CD
AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('R' , 'B&R') 
INNER JOIN (SELECT DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_ORDER_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL 
WHERE RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID NOT IN  /*('CXO','CXE','CXS','CXEN','CXTRO')*/
(SELECT DISTINCT GSP_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.WI_BCS_MAPPING WHERE GSP_OR_OFFR_FLAG='GSP' AND CPQ_FLAG='Y')
GROUP BY 1,2,3 ) BKGS /*MODIFIED AS PART OF CPQ INTEGRATION*/
ON  BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND  BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND TQUOTE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
AND TQUOTE.PRODUCT_KEY = BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY 
-----AND SOL.BK_SS_CD NOT IN ('CS','BCS') /*ADDED AS PART OF CPQ INTEGRATION*//*REMOVING AS part of FEB2024*/
 AND DV_QT_ASSOCIATION_CD NOT LIKE '%BCS' -- ADDED THS CONDITION FEB2024 Changes
GROUP BY 1,2, 3, 4, 5,SOL.BK_SS_CD
UNION 
SELECT BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM, SOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY, SOL1.DV_BKGS_REV_CD,  DV_QT_ASSOCIATION_CD, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), USER, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), USER,
SOL1.BK_SS_CD
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD SOL1
INNER JOIN (SELECT DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_ORDER_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL 
WHERE RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID NOT IN  /*('CXO','CXE','CXS','CXEN','CXTRO')*/
(SELECT DISTINCT GSP_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.WI_BCS_MAPPING WHERE GSP_OR_OFFR_FLAG='GSP' AND CPQ_FLAG='Y')
 GROUP BY 1,2,3) BKGS /*MODIFIED AS PART OF CPQ INTEGRATION*/
ON  BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND  BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
    AND DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('R' , 'B&R') 
WHERE SOL1.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM NOT LIKE '%AS-T'
----AND SOL1.BK_SS_CD NOT IN ('CS','BCS') /*ADDED AS PART OF CPQ INTEGRATION*//*REMOVING AS part of FEB2024*/
 AND DV_QT_ASSOCIATION_CD NOT LIKE '%BCS' -- ADDED THIS CONDITION FEB2024 Changes
GROUP BY 1,2, 3, 4, 5, SOL1.BK_SS_CD

SELECT                
                QUOTES_REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
                ,COALESCE(N_SALES_ORDER_TV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,-9999) AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
                ,QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
                ,QUOTES_REV_INCR.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT
                ,QUOTES_REV_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

                ,N_AS_PRODUCT_ATSTB_TV.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME AS BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME      
                ,N_AS_PRODUCT_ATSTB_TV.BK_AS_TECHNOLOGY_NAME AS BK_AS_TECHNOLOGY_NAME

                ,N_AS_PRODUCT_ATSTB_TV.BK_AS_BUSINESS_SERVICE_NAME AS BK_AS_BUSINESS_SERVICE_NAME   


                ,QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
                ,SUM(
                CASE WHEN QUOTES_REV_INCR.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID IN ( 'AS SUBSCRIPTION', 'AS TRANSACTION' ) AND SQUOTE.QUOTE_NUM  IS NOT NULL AND   COALESCE(SQUOTE.TOT_QUOTE_NET_PRICE,0)  <>  0    AND COALESCE(SQUOTE.QUOTE_CNT,0) > 0 THEN            
				(CAST(COALESCE(QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,0)   AS DECIMAL(26,7))*  SQUOTE.QUOTE_NET_PRICE ) /SQUOTE.TOT_QUOTE_NET_PRICE 
				WHEN QUOTES_REV_INCR.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID  IN ( 'AS SUBSCRIPTION', 'AS TRANSACTION' ) AND SQUOTE.QUOTE_NUM  IS NOT NULL AND   COALESCE(SQUOTE.TOT_QUOTE_NET_PRICE,0)  =  0    AND COALESCE(SQUOTE.QUOTE_CNT,0) > 0 THEN  
				(CAST(QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  AS DECIMAL(26,7))) /SQUOTE.QUOTE_CNT
				ELSE  QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  END
                ) AS RAW_REVENUE_AMT

                ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER

				QUOTES_REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY,
				QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_FISCAL_DT

,QUOTES_REV_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE

,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  /*added as part of April 2021 release*/
,QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT /* ADDED AS THE PART OF FY23Finance_FEB_Release PPMT SCOPE */
,QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE /* ADDED AS A PART OF PPMT SCOPE FOR EDW_FY23Finance_APR_Release  */  
,QUOTES_REV_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
                FROM   (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_EE_QT_SKU_REV_INCR_PNL  
 WHERE RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID
----- NOT IN ('CXO','CXE','CXS','CXEN','CXTRO') 
NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT GSP_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.WI_BCS_MAPPING WHERE GSP_OR_OFFR_FLAG='GSP' AND CPQ_FLAG='Y')
)QUOTES_REV_INCR


                LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV N_SALES_ORDER_TV 
                ON          QUOTES_REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY=N_SALES_ORDER_TV.SALES_ORDER_KEY 

                LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_AS_QUOTE_SKU_BKGS_ATSTB_PNL  N_AS_PRODUCT_ATSTB_TV 
                                                                                ON          QUOTES_REV_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY = N_AS_PRODUCT_ATSTB_TV.PRODUCT_KEY 
                                                                                AND       COALESCE(N_AS_PRODUCT_ATSTB_TV.END_TV_DTM , CAST( '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 

                LEFT OUTER JOIN
                (

                SELECT                

                SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
                MT_QSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,  /*Added AS part of US100597 - ATB Logic Enhancements for Bookings & Revenue Adjustments - May4 2017*/
                MT_QSOL.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM QUOTE_NUM,
				MT_QSOL.DV_QT_ASSOCIATION_CD, /* US114676 -  AS Revenue Phase - 3: ATB Allocation in the Revenue PV */
                QUOTE_NET_PRICE,
                SUM(QUOTE_NET_PRICE) OVER (PARTITION BY  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_ORDER_KEY)  TOT_QUOTE_NET_PRICE,  /*Added AS part of US100597 - ATB Logic Enhancements for Bookings & Revenue Adjustments - May4 2017*/ 
                COUNT(MT_QSOL.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM) OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_ORDER_KEY)  QUOTE_CNT    , /*Added AS part of US100597 - ATB Logic Enhancements for Bookings & Revenue Adjustments - May4 2017*/ 
                MT_QSOL.BK_SS_CD
                FROM 
                                                                (SELECT SOL_DRVD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                                                                SOL_DRVD.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM,
																SOL_DRVD.DV_QT_ASSOCIATION_CD, /* US114676 -  AS Revenue Phase - 3: ATB Allocation in the Revenue PV */
                                                                SOL_DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
                                                                SOL_DRVD.DV_BKGS_REV_CD ,
																SOL_DRVD.BK_SS_CD
                                                                FROM  $$STGDB.WI_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRV_REV_INCL SOL_DRVD /*Change MT_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRVD to WI_SOLINE_AS_QT_DRV_REV_INCL  AS part of   US137173*/
                                                                 WHERE SOL_DRVD.DV_BKGS_REV_CD IN ('R' , 'B&R') 
                                                                GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5, SOL_DRVD.BK_SS_CD
                                                                ) MT_QSOL /*Added AS part of US100597 - ATB Logic Enhancements for Bookings & Revenue Adjustments - May4 2017*/
                LEFT  JOIN 
                (
                SELECT                
                N_AS_QUOTE.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM AS QUOTE_NUM   
                ,N_AS_QUOTE.SS_CD,
                CASE     WHEN  SUM ( N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL.SERVICE_PRD_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT ) =0 THEN 
                SUM ( N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL.SERVICE_PRD_COST_USD_AMT )
                ELSE      SUM ( N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL.SERVICE_PRD_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT ) 
                END       

                AS QUOTE_NET_PRICE
                FROM         $$SERVICEVWDB.N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL 

                INNER JOIN  $$SERVICEVWDB.N_AS_QUOTE N_AS_QUOTE  
                                                                                ON          N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM = N_AS_QUOTE.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM   
                                                                                AND                N_AS_QUOTE.SS_CD = N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL.SS_CD
                WHERE N_AS_QT_WTH_SBS_PRC_DLVRBL_DTL.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N' 
                GROUP BY 1, 2
                UNION
                ALL
                SELECT                
                QUOTE_ATB.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM AS QUOTE_NUM,
				QUOTE.SS_CD,
                CAST (SUM( 
                CASE     WHEN QUOTE_TASK.AS_QT_MS_TASK_NET_USD_PRICE = '-999' THEN '0' 
                ELSE      QUOTE_TASK.AS_QT_MS_TASK_NET_USD_PRICE 
                END       * QUOTE_ATB.AS_QT_MS_TSK_ATB_SPLIT_PCT_INT/100) AS DECIMAL (27,                                5)) AS QUOTE_NET_PRICE
                FROM    
                 $$SERVICEVWDB.N_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_TASK_ATB QUOTE_ATB 

                INNER JOIN  $$SERVICEVWDB.N_AS_QUOTE QUOTE 
                                                                                ON          QUOTE.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM = QUOTE_ATB.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM   
                                                                                AND          QUOTE.SS_CD   = QUOTE_ATB.BK_SS_CD

                INNER JOIN  $$SERVICEVWDB.N_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_TASK  QUOTE_TASK 
                                                                                ON          QUOTE_ATB.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM=QUOTE_TASK.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM
                                                                                AND       QUOTE_ATB.BK_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_NUM_INT=QUOTE_TASK.BK_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_NUM_INT
                                                                                AND       QUOTE_ATB.BK_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_TASK_NUM=QUOTE_TASK.BK_AS_QUOTE_MILESTONE_TASK_NUM
																				AND      QUOTE_ATB.BK_SS_CD = QUOTE_TASK.BK_SS_CD
                                                                                AND       QUOTE_ATB.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
                                                                                AND       QUOTE_TASK.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
                GROUP BY 1, 2
                )SQUOTE  
                                                                                ON          MT_QSOL.BK_AS_QUOTE_NUM = SQUOTE.QUOTE_NUM 
																				AND       MT_QSOL.BK_SS_CD =  SQUOTE.SS_CD

                ) SQUOTE               
                                                                                ON          QUOTES_REV_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SQUOTE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
                                                                                and          QUOTES_REV_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SQUOTE.SALES_ORDER_KEY  /*Added AS part of US100597 - ATB Logic Enhancements for Bookings & Revenue Adjustments - May4 2017*/  

																				and        	QUOTES_REV_INCR.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID  IN ( 'AS SUBSCRIPTION','AS TRANSACTION' )   /*Added AS part of US100597 - ATB Logic Enhancements for Bookings & Revenue Adjustments - May4 2017*/

                ,SQUOTE.QUOTE_NUM

                ,QUOTES_REV_INCR.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
